parameters.subject: =Prisoncall monthly summary

parameters.content:
## Workflow 5 - Monthly Admin
Runs 1st of every month at 08:00 (Australia/Sydney).

- Lists all active Stripe subscriptions, counts by plan, calculates MRR (monthly-equivalent).
- SMS to owner (OWNER_MOBILE) and email to owner (OWNER_EMAIL) with the summary + a reminder to verify fixed costs.
